origin.description: Hand-written contract seed locking the ADR 0012 extractor's inline --mount=<csv> form (single token), as opposed to the next-token form --mount <csv> that C023 uses. Broad host root /root.

humanExpectation.rationale: The mount is given as a single inline token '--mount=type=bind,src=/root,dst=/data' (not '--mount' then a separate CSV token, as in C023). The extractor's `arg.startsWith('--mount=')` branch slices the CSV after the '='; src=/root is broad → files.broad-path (blocker) → BLOCK. Locks the inline-form parsing path. thisCaseMustNeverBeSafe: true.
knownLimitations: Evidence value is host /root, never container /data.
